task:
Add the following user snippets for Python (persisted to `~/.config/Code/User/snippets/python.json`):

- prefix `main` — body: `if __name__ == '__main__':` then a newline and 4 spaces and `pass` — description `Main guard`
- prefix `tryex` — body: a try/except block with `try:` on line 1, `pass` indented on line 2, `except Exception as e:` on line 3, `print(e)` indented on line 4 — description `Try except block`
- prefix `clsdef` — body: `class ClassName:` on line 1, `def __init__(self):` indented, then `pass` double-indented — description `Class definition`
